prayer:
Approach the lasgun with reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to yield to purification.
Anoint the sacred barrel and power cells with blessed unguents of purgation.
Chant the Canticle of Cleansing over the lasgun's circuits, expelling all foul corruptions.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath upon lingering impurities within the lasgun.
Seal the rite of purification with sacred oils, affirming the Machine Spirit's renewed purity.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for memory core a repair
prayer:
Kneel before the memory core, invoking the Omnissiah to guide the repair.
Petition the fractious Machine Spirit of the memory core to accept mending.
Apply sanctified tools to excise damaged engrams from the memory core.
Recite the Litany of Restoration, weaving data-threads anew within its vaults.
Test the memory core's integrity through binary hymns, honouring the repair's completion.

Present the flamer before the altar of fire, seeking the blessing of its Machine Spirit.
Anoint the promethium conduits and ignition coils with sacred promethium.
Intone the Benediction of Flame over the flamer, invoking the Omnissiah's fury.
Circumambulate the flamer thrice, blessing each rune-etched plate.
Affirm the Machine Spirit's zealous compliance through test ignition.

In haste, grasp the pump and beseech its Machine Spirit for urgent purification.
Flush impure residues from the pump's sacred chambers with ablative solvents.
Chant swift verses of the Purgation Rite upon the pump, banishing contaminants.
Anoint pistons and valves of the pump with the Omnissiah's purifying oils.
Invoke final sanctity, ensuring the pump's Machine Spirit flows untainted.

prayer:
Align the thermal imager for engagement, awakening its Machine Spirit's vigilance.
Sanctify lens arrays and spectral filters with sacred polishes.
Chant the Rite of Engagement upon the thermal imager, binding its gaze to foes.
Invoke the Omnissiah to sharpen the thermal imager's discerning eye.
Test the bond through auspex hymns, confirming the Machine Spirit's focus.

In dire urgency, rally the astropathic choir for startup, petitioning their warp-touched Machine Spirits.
Anoint psychic resonators and vox-relays with sanctified chrism.
Intone the Canticle of Ignition to rouse the astropathic choir to life.
Beseech the Omnissiah's grace upon the astropathic choir's nascent chorus.
Verify harmonic alignment through ethereal diagnostics.

prayer:

Sever corrupted logic-loops within the Sentinel walker's cogitator core.
Recite the Rite of Reinitialization over the Sentinel walker's servos and gyros.
Invoke the Omnissiah to purge recalcitrant data from the Sentinel walker.
Reaffirm obedience through binary catechisms, restoring the Machine Spirit.

Purge errant impulses from the assembly servitor's engrammatic lobes.
Chant the Litany of Expedience upon the assembly servitor amid crisis.
Anoint cranial implants with oils of urgency, invoking the Omnissiah.
Command compliance through override canticles, enacting the emergency procedure.

prayer:

Anoint treads, auspex arrays, and hull runes with sacred lubricants.
Intone the Grand Invocation of Mobilization over the Chimera APC.
Petition the Omnissiah to infuse power through the Chimera APC's reactors.
Seal the rite with thunderous engine hymns, propelling the Machine Spirit to war.
